company.name_jp: 株式会社ヒューマニクス

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established 1994-02-15. Capital: 20 million JPY (as of 1998-06). Located in Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo. Business: System development, network development, telecommunications. Only CEO information found on website. ISO/IEC 27001:2013 certified. CEO is 西薫.
